zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan於1200年出生時，他的父親Sir David Muir of Polkelly26歲，母親Lady Isabel Graham24歲。他於大約1230年與Isabel de Comyn在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1280年在蘇格蘭艾斯爾享年80歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan于1200年出生时，他的父亲Sir David Muir of Polkelly26岁，母亲Lady Isabel Graham24岁。他于大约1230年与Isabel de Comyn在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1280年在苏格兰艾斯爾享年80岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

nameMeanings.name: Mure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (Sicily): variant of   Morea  .
Scottish: variant of   Muir  .
English: occupational name from Old French muer ‘mewer’, i.e. someone who tended to hawks in the cages in which they were kept while moulting. Compare Mew .

variants.name: Mura
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Akio, Hideo, Masao, Nanako, Tsutomu, Yoshi.  French Alphonse, Amie, Henri.
German: altered form of some similar (like-sounding) German or perhaps French surname. It is also common in France (Alsace), where it was first recorded in the form Morrau, later Murra(w).
Italian (southern Sardinia): topographic name or nickname from Sardinian mura ‘mulberry’ or ‘blackberry’.

variants.name: Muir
meanings: Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived on a moor, from Older Scots muir ‘moor’ (an expanse of bare, wild upland country). There has been some confusion with Mure .

variants.name: Morea
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Saverio, Domenic, Ferdinando, Rocco.  Spanish Manuel, Carlos, Cesar, Elvira, Jesus, Mauricio.

Italian (Apulia): from the personal name Morea, originally a habitational name from Morea, the medieval name of the Greek region of Peloponnese, named as the land of mulberry trees, from mōrea ‘mulberry’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from any of the places called Morea, in Badajoz, Navarre, and Lleida provinces.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.
Korean: variant of   O  .
Japanese: variant of Ō (see O ).

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of George .

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: Gilchrist
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (western) and Irish (Down): from Gaelic Mac Giolla Chríosd, Mac Gille Chríosd ‘son of the servant of Christ’.

variants.name: Kilcrease
meanings: Altered form of Scottish   Gilchrist  .
History: Robert Kilcrease (c. 1750–1808) came from Scotland(probably Kilmarnock) to Edgefield, SC, c. 1770.

variants.name: Gilchrest
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Gilchrist  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Gilkerson
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Chrìosd ‘son of Gille Chrìosd' (see Gilchrist ).

variants.name: Gilkey
meanings: Irish (northern): possibly a pet form of the Scottishpersonal name   Gilchrist  .

variants.name: Gilcrest
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Gilchrist  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Gilcrease
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Gilchrist  .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan was born in 1200, his father, Sir David Muir of Polkelly, was 26 and his mother, Lady Isabel Graham, was 24. He married Isabel de Comyn about 1230, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1280, in Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 80, and was buried in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan est né en 1200, son père, Sir David Muir of Polkelly, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabel Graham, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Comyn environ 1230, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1280, à Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan 1200 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir David Muir of Polkelly 26 und seine Mutter Lady Isabel Graham 24. Er hat um 1230 in Scotland Isabel de Comyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1280 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan è nato il nel 1200, il suo padre, Sir David Muir of Polkelly, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lady Isabel Graham, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Comyn circa 1230, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1280, nel Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallanが1200年に生まれた時，父Sir David Muir of Polkellyは26歳，母Lady Isabel Grahamは24歳であった。約1230年にスコットランドでIsabel de Comynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1280年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで80歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan(이)가 1200년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir David Muir of Polkelly(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Isabel Graham(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1230년 스컷랜드에서 Isabel de Comyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1280년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan nasceu em 1200, seu pai, Sir David Muir of Polkelly, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabel Graham, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Comyn aproximadamente 1230, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1280, em Ayrshire, Scotland, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan родился в 1200 г., его отцу по имени Sir David Muir of Polkelly было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabel Graham, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Comyn около 1230 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1280 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan nació en 1200, su papá, Sir David Muir of Polkelly, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Isabel Graham, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Isabel de Comyn aproximadamente 1230, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1280, en Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
